title: Upon A Young Mother Of Many Children.
content:
Let all chaste matrons, when they chance to see
    My num'rous issue, praise and pity me:
    Praise me for having such a fruitful womb,
    Pity me, too, who found so soon a tomb.
meaning:
This evocative piece by Robert Herrick, titled "Upon A Young Mother Of Many Children.", represents a masterful exploration of classic. The lines capture a profound emotional resonance...

### Why We Love This Line
At Linespedia, we believe that poetry is the ultimate sanctuary for the soul...
